classes.name: xpander_sdk.AgentStatus
documentation: Enum representing the possible statuses of an agent.

classes.name: xpander_sdk.Agents

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agents.__init__
documentation:
---
param configuration: '-'
---

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agents.get
documentation:
Retrieves an agent by ID and initializes it with the given source node type.

```
param agent_id

The ID of the agent to retrieve.

param source_node_type

The source node type for the agent, default is SDK.

return

The requested Agent instance.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agents.get_custom_agent
documentation:
Retrieves the custom agent instance, initializing it with the given source node type.

```
param source_node_type

The source node type for the custom agent, default is SDK.

return

The custom Agent instance.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agents.list
documentation:
Retrieves the list of agents.

If `refetch` is true, it re-fetches the list
from the API even if agents are already loaded.

```
param refetch

If true, forces a re-fetch of the agent list from the API.

return

Array of Agent instances.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agents.agents_list
documentation: Collection of Agent instances managed by this class.
Manages a collection of Agent instances in xpanderAI, providing methods to list, retrieve, and initialize specific agents including custom agents.

classes.name: xpander_sdk.Configuration

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Configuration.api_key
documentation: API key for authenticating requests to xpanderAI.

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Configuration.base_url
documentation: Base URL for the xpanderAI API requests.

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Configuration.custom_params
documentation: Custom parameters for additional configuration options.

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Configuration.with_metrics_report
documentation: Flag to enable or disable metrics reporting.
Manages the configuration settings for the xpanderAI client, including API key, base URL, metrics reporting, and custom parameters.

documentation: Identifier for the last node accessed in the session.

documentation: The graph item associated with the prompt group session.
Represents a session within a prompt group in xpanderAI, managing the graph item and tracking the last processed node.

classes.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList

methods.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList.__init__
documentation:
---
param graphs: Collection of graph items associated with prompt groups.
param pg_oas: Array of agent tools specific to prompt groups.
param sessions: List of active prompt group sessions.
---

methods.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList.get_tools_for_active_session
documentation:
Retrieves the available tools for the currently active session, filtering tools based on their position in the graph and local tool prefix.

```
param all_tools

A list of all tools available for the session.

return

A filtered list of tools available for the active session.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList.reset_sessions
documentation: Resets all active prompt group sessions.

methods.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList.start_pg_session
documentation:
Starts a new session for a specified tool call, associating it with a prompt group.

If the prompt group or graph cannot be matched, an error is thrown.

```
param tool

The tool call used to start the prompt group session.

return

A system message indicating the prompt group was successfully selected.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList.active_session
documentation: Returns the currently active session, if one exists.

methods.name: xpander_sdk.PromptGroupSessionsList.pg_oas
documentation: Array of agent tools specific to prompt groups.
Manages a collection of prompt group sessions, providing functionalities to start, manage, and retrieve tools for active sessions in xpanderAI.

classes.name: xpander_sdk.XpanderClient

methods.name: xpander_sdk.XpanderClient.__init__
documentation:
Constructs a new XpanderClient instance.

```
param api_key



param base_url



param with_metrics_report



param custom_params



throws

Will throw an error if an invalid API key is specified.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.XpanderClient.extract_tool_calls
documentation:
Extracts tool calls from an LLM response based on the specified LLM provider.

```
param llm_response

The LLM response to analyze for tool calls.

param llm_provider

The LLM provider, defaults to OPEN_AI.

return

An array of tool calls extracted from the LLM response.

throws

Error if the specified LLM provider is not supported.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.XpanderClient.agents
documentation: Instance of Agents to manage xpanderAI agents.

methods.name: xpander_sdk.XpanderClient.configuration
documentation: Configuration settings for the xpanderAI client.
XpanderClient provides methods for configuring and interacting with xpanderAI tools, managing agents, and extracting tool calls from LLM responses.

classes.name: xpander_sdk.Agent

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.__init__
documentation:
---
param auto_load: Whether the agent should automatically load its resources.
param configuration: Configuration settings for the agent.
param graphs: Array of graph items related to the agent.
param id: Unique identifier for the agent.
param name: Human-readable name of the agent.
param organization_id: Organization ID to which the agent belongs.
param pg_oas: Array of agent tools specific to prompt groups.
param pg_schemas: Array of agent tools specific to prompt groups.
param pg_switch_allowed: Whether prompt group switching is allowed for the agent.
param source_nodes: List of source nodes associated with the agent.
param status: Current status of the agent.
param tools: Array of tools available to the agent.
---

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.add_local_tools
documentation:
Adds local tools to the agent with prefixed function names.

```
param tools

The list of local tools to add.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.get_tools
documentation:
Retrieves tools compatible with the specified LLM provider.

```
param llm_provider

The LLM provider to filter tools by.

param return_all_tools



return

A list of tools that match the specified provider.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.load
documentation:
Loads the agent data from the specified source node type.

```
param source_node_type

The type of source node to load.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.run_tool
documentation:
Executes a single tool call and returns the result.

```
param tool

The tool call to execute.

param payload_extension



return

The result of the tool execution.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.run_tools
documentation:
Executes multiple tool calls sequentially and returns their results.

```
param tool_calls

The list of tool calls to execute.

param payload_extension



return

A list of results for each tool execution.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.schemas_by_node_name
documentation:
Retrieves schemas grouped by node name based on the active prompt group session.

This method returns an object where each key is a node name, and the value is the corresponding schema.
It ensures that schemas are only fetched if there is an active session with a valid `promptGroupId`
and if `pgSchemas` is not empty.

```
return

A record of schemas indexed by their node name, or an empty object if conditions are not met.
```

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.select_prompt_group
documentation:
---
param prompt_group_name: '-'
---

methods.name: xpander_sdk.Agent.tools
documentation: Array of tools available to the agent.

Represents an agent in xpanderAI, managing the tools, sessions, and operations associated with the agent.

This class enables loading agents, handling tool executions,
and managing prompt group sessions.
